brief: Today's news spans transit improvements in the Bronx, warnings of Russian infrastructure attacks, and controversies over ICE tactics and Epstein ties. Papers explore cross-domain emotion recognition, graph database visualization, and AI research assistants.
news_summary: Mamdani pushes Bronx bus lane; Lithuania warns of Russian infrastructure strikes; Trump defends ICE traffic stops; Epstein files scrutiny continues; Russia hits Black Sea tankers; Utah bans Stephen King collection; Starmer's final PMQs.
papers_summary: CD-MED introduces cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors; GraphPolaris enables query and visualization of graph databases; Aïra rethinks AI assistants for interdisciplinary science.

en.brief: Today's news spans transit improvements in the Bronx, warnings of Russian infrastructure attacks, and controversies over ICE tactics and Epstein ties. Papers explore cross-domain emotion recognition, graph database visualization, and AI research assistants.
en.news_summary: Mamdani pushes Bronx bus lane; Lithuania warns of Russian infrastructure strikes; Trump defends ICE traffic stops; Epstein files scrutiny continues; Russia hits Black Sea tankers; Utah bans Stephen King collection; Starmer's final PMQs.
en.papers_summary: CD-MED introduces cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors; GraphPolaris enables query and visualization of graph databases; Aïra rethinks AI assistants for interdisciplinary science.

zh.brief: 今日中国新闻聚焦经济放缓至4.3%、小红书的合规举报、以及一名被控间谍罪的地震学家；国际方面，特朗普施压ICE重启交通检查、Epstein案新进展；学术界无中文论文，全球研究侧重人机交互与AI。
zh.news_summary: 中国二季度GDP增速降至4.3%，创2022年底新低；小红书前员工向香港监管机构举报公司合规问题，可能影响上市；地震学家陈友麟因涉嫌间谍罪被中国拘留近两年。其他热点包括香港独立书店回忆、世界盃补水暂停致进球增多、以及霸王龙化石创拍卖纪录。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文，国际arXiv论文主要涉及跨领域情感描述、图数据库可视化、AI研究助手、以及人机协作平台等HCI领域研究。

todays_image.caption: The lotus, known for its ability to rise quickly through murky water, mirrors the Mamdani project's aim to cut through congestion and speed up Bronx bus transit.
todays_image.title: Lotus major Sm.
